message:
🐛 Fix NamespaceOverview auto-select and persistence tests (#10976)

Align E2E test expectations with actual demo data sources:

- Update DEMO_CLUSTERS to match getDemoClusters() in hooks/mcp/shared.ts
  (was ['prod-us-east', ...], now matches actual demo names like 'kind-local')
- Update _DEMO_NAMESPACES to match getDemoNamespaces() in hooks/useCachedData
- Remove stale **/api/mcp/** mock from setupDemoMode — in demo mode,
  fullFetchClusters() uses getDemoClusters() directly, never hitting the API
- Remove agent override mock from setupLiveMode — the 200 with { clusters: [] }
  was truthy and short-circuited the backend-API fallback, leaving the cluster
  list empty. The 503 from mockApiFallback correctly causes fallthrough to the
  mocked /api/mcp/clusters endpoint.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Andy Anderson <clubanderson@gmail.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:

-const _DEMO_NAMESPACES = ['default', 'kube-system', 'monitoring']
+// Must match the first entries from getDemoClusters() in hooks/mcp/shared.ts

+  'kind-local', 'minikube', 'k3s-edge', 'eks-prod-us-east-1', 'gke-staging',

+  'do-nyc1-prod', 'rancher-mgmt', 'vllm-gpu-cluster',
+]
+// Must match getDemoNamespaces() in hooks/useCachedData/demoData.ts
+const _DEMO_NAMESPACES = [
+  'default', 'kube-system', 'kube-public', 'monitoring', 'production',
+  'staging', 'batch', 'data', 'ingress', 'security',
+]

+  // falls through to the built-in getDemoClusters() demo data path.
